Good service. Friendly and above all, fast.

reviews.comment:
La atención de los playeros siempre excelente y buenos precio del combustible, pero no sé que mes pasó, se olvidaron de los clientes.
Hace muy poquito cambiaron el lugar para inflar  cubiertas y te obligan hacer la cola nuevamente en el único surtidor que tienen el equipo!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants is always excellent, and the fuel prices are good, but I don't know what month it was; they forgot about their customers.
They recently changed the tire inflation location, and they're forcing you to wait in line again at the only pump they have!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQweFpLdmlnRRAB
